data.title: Addentax, a US-listed company, plans to buy 8,000 Bitcoins and mainstream cryptocurrencies such as TRUMP
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Nasdaq-listed Addentax Group Corp announced that the company has negotiated with some major and influential Bitcoin and other mainstream cryptocurrency holders, and plans to acquire up to 8,000 Bitcoins and other cryptocurrencies, such as TRUMP tokens, at an estimated cost of $800 million, and will complete the financing through the issuance of common stock. No final agreement has been reached yet.
Addentax Group management said that this move is the company's core action to support its long-term investment and holding strategy for crypto assets, strengthening its balance sheet by acquiring highly liquid and widely recognized digital assets, while attracting new shareholders with experience and expertise in the field of cryptocurrencies. (PRNewswire)

data.title: eToro CEO says Warren Buffett convinced him to focus less on crypto
data.description:
"I think nobody doubts that crypto is here to stay," eToro CEO Yoni Assia said Thursday on CNBC.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/354503/etoro-ceo-says-warren-buffett-convinced-him-to-focus-less-on-crypto?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Coinbase fires compromised agents in India — Coinbase CSO
data.description:
Coinbase has reportedly fired a group of customer support agents following their alleged involvement in social engineering attacks on users. The contracted agents were based in India. According to a May 15 Fortune interview, Coinbase's chief security officer, Philip Martin, said the company flagged customer support contractors who allowed scammers access to user data, suggesting they could be Indian nationals. The CSO’s comments came after some crypto users reeled from attempted phishing attacks using their Coinbase data, which the exchange estimated could cost them between $180 million and $400 million in remediation and reimbursement
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/coinbase-social-engineering-agents-india-cso?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: eToro CEO: Decided to reduce focus on cryptocurrencies after meeting with Buffett
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: eToro CEO Yoni Assia said that after meeting with Berkshire Hathaway Chairman Warren Buffett, he re-evaluated his focus on cryptocurrencies and decided to devote more energy to traditional value investing. Yoni Assia had previously been an active advocate of crypto assets, but was inspired by his exchanges with Buffett and began to emphasize the importance of long-term investment and fundamental analysis. He pointed out that although crypto technology has potential, the current market volatility is large and investors should pay more attention to the balance between risk management and asset allocation. eToro has also recently adjusted its business focus and strengthened its support for traditional financial products such as stocks and ETFs to adapt to changing market demands. (The Block)

data.title: Tether Delay Let $78M in Illicit Funds Slip Through, Report Finds
data.description:
A delay in Tether’s wallet blacklisting process has enabled over $78 million in illicit funds to be moved before enforcement actions could be executed.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/tether-delay-let-78m-in-illicit-funds-slip-through-report-finds/

data.title: CZ: MGX’s $2 billion investment in Binance has nothing to do with TRUMP tokens
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News, CZ, former CEO of Binance, posted on the X platform that he forwarded the video related to Trump's induced question in the interview "A UAE company reached a $2 billion deal with TRUMP cryptocurrency" and said: "This is a typical example of FUD. The questions in the interview are wrong, vague and misleading. If this question refers to MGX's $2 billion investment in Binance, the transaction was completed using USD1 stablecoins, which has nothing to do with TRUMP tokens. TRUMP is just a Meme coin, but this is an investment transaction between investors in Abu Dhabi and a private company. The transaction can be made in any currency, such as Bitcoin, UAE Dirham, US dollars or USD1, which mainly depends on the choice of the payer. The recipient can convert the funds into any other currency after receiving the payment, and Binance provides the best liquidity in the world. FUD, 4. (By the way, there are finally more fiat currencies/stablecoins to buy on dips)."

data.title: Spot Bitcoin ETF inflows fall, but BTC whale activity points to bull market acceleration
data.description:
Key takeaways:Spot Bitcoin ETF inflows dropped over 90% from $3 billion to $228 million in four weeks. While strong ETF inflows often drive Bitcoin rallies, recent data shows price movements can occur independently. Despite short-term selling pressure, long-term BTC whale buying suggests a potential continuation of the BTC uptrend. The Bitcoin (BTC) market posted a 90+% drop in spot BTC exchange-traded fund (ETF) inflows, falling from $3 billion in the last week of April to just $228 million this week
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/spot-bitcoin-etf-inflows-fall-but-btc-whale-activity-points-to-bull-market-acceleration?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trump administration prepares biggest bank capital rollback since 2008
data.description:
According to the Financial Times, the Trump administration is moving forward with a sweeping plan to loosen one of the toughest capital requirements imposed on US banks after the 2008 financial collapse. Officials inside Trump’s White House, along with top regulators, are finalizing a proposal to weaken the supplementary leverage ratio (SLR), a rule that […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-biggest-bank-capital-rollback-2008/

data.title: Data: Investment bank Jefferies' cumulative crypto asset trading volume has exceeded US$150 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Since assisting MicroStrategy (now renamed Strategy) in purchasing Bitcoin in 2019, investment bank Jefferies has gradually established a strong influence in the field of crypto assets. So far, Jefferies has completed 120 transactions in the fields of financial technology, market structure and exchanges, with a cumulative transaction volume of more than US$150 billion. In addition, Jefferies is also a mainstream investment bank that has set up full-time senior bankers for crypto assets. It has now become a full-service crypto investment industry player. Its representative transactions include: Kraken's acquisition of NinjaTrader (US$1.5 billion), Galaxy Digital and DRW's financing, and serving as an advisor to the unsecured creditors committee in the FTX bankruptcy case. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Crypto Exchange CEO's Daughter, Grandson Targeted in Paris Kidnap Attempt
data.description:
The daughter and grandson of a French crypto exchange CEO were targeted in a failed kidnap attempt, adding to the growing number of crypto-related kidnapping cases in the country, France 24 reported on Tuesday.A video widely shared on social media showed the attempt, in which three masked men wrestled the woman and another person to the ground in Paris. A shop owner intervened, waving a fire extinguisher, and the attackers gave up, driving off in two waiting vans. France 24 identified the crypto exchange as Paymium
source: https://www.coindesk.com/business/2025/05/15/crypto-exchange-ceos-daughter-grandson-targeted-in-paris-kidnap-attempt

data.title: Coinsilium Group raises £1.25 million via ordinary share placement to buy Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Web3 investment institution Coinsilium Group announced that it has raised £1.25 million through the placement of ordinary shares to purchase Bitcoin, further investment and general working capital. In addition, the company will also choose a Bitcoin financial strategy. (Sharesmagazine)

data.title: Core Inflation Indicator Expected to Reach Lowest Level Since 2021
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the core inflation indicator favored by the Federal Reserve is anticipated to drop to its lowest level since 2021 in April's data. Economists from Pantheon Macroeconomics and Capital Economics estimate that the core Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) annual rate, excluding volatile food and energy prices, could decrease from 2.6% in March to 2.5% in April. This would mark the lowest level since March 2021, just before the pandemic-induced inflation surge began.

Previously, BlockBeats reported that Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell indicated the April PCE might be around 2.2%.

data.title: Report Reveals Tether’s Blacklisting Isn’t Instant — $78M Moved Illegally
data.description:
TL;DR A report from AMLBot reveals that Tether delays enforcing blacklists, allowing $78 million in USDT to be moved before the funds were frozen. The delay stems from Tether’s multi-signature approval process, giving malicious actors a time window to evade the freeze. Tether states it collaborates with over 255 agencies across 55 countries and has. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/report-reveals-tethers-blacklisting-isnt-instant-78m-moved-illegally/

data.title: The temperature check proposal to include PEPE as a supported asset on the Aave platform was passed with 76.76% support
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the AAVE community governance proposal, the temperature check proposal to use PEPE as an asset supported by the Aave platform has been passed with a support rate of 76.76%. The proposal recommends introducing PEPE as collateral in the isolated market into Aave V3, aiming to expand the user base, promote the growth of GHO stablecoins, and increase the protocol liquidation income. The risk service provider will set the risk parameters in the future and enter the ARFC and AIP process.

data.title: Hong Kong Police Force: CryptoTrace, a virtual asset analysis tool, has been deployed
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Cyber ​​Security and Technology Crime Bureau (CTCB) of the Hong Kong Police Force announced the security maintenance of Hong Kong's virtual asset ecosystem. It pointed out that Chief Superintendent Lam Cheuk-ho emphasized the importance of exchanges, regulators and law enforcement agencies to share responsibilities. In addition, the CTCB cooperated with the University of Hong Kong to develop the virtual asset analysis tool CryptoTrace, providing advanced intelligence and investigation support for criminal investigation units. In addition, the New Territories South Regional Anti-Fraud Team was established.
